meta.title: Emendation of Pseudomonas straminea Iizuka and Komagata 1963
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The description of Pseudomonas straminae Iizuka and Komagata 1963 was emended with data newly obtained. The spelling of the name of this taxon is also corrected as Pseudomonas straminea. Strains that were previously named 'Pseudomonas ochracea' were identified as P. straminea.
